jobs.title: Controller Medior/ Senior at the intersection of Business & Finance control
jobs.location: 5611 ZS ZS Eindhoven (Noord-Brabant) Netherlands Company address The Swatch Grou
jobs.description: Controller Medior/ Senior at the intersection of Business & Finance control - Swatch Group Controller Medior/ Senior at the intersection of Business & Finance control Bedrijfsintroductie A versatile job where you will balance subject matter between Finance and Business but also be an important point of contact for your team. Swatch Group is the world's number one manufacturer of watches. With 16 watch brands, the Group is represented in all price ranges, additionally active in the production and sale of jewelry, watch developments and components. Swatch Group represents the following watch brands, among others: Breguet, Harry Winston, Blancpain, Glashütte Original, Jaquet Droz, Omega, Longines, Rado, Union Glashütte, Tissot, Balmain, Certina, Mido, Hamilton, Swatch and Flik Flak. The Group has a strong distribution and multi-brand retail network with two sophisticated boutiques under the name Tourbillon and Hour Passion. Swatch Group is a major player in advanced nanomechanical, nanoelectronic and Bluetooth technologies essential for watchmaking and other industries. From our headquarters in Eindhoven, the Netherlands, we supply independent jewelers and chain stores. In addition, The Swatch Group Netherlands has a growing number of its own outlets, such as Swatch Stores, Tissot Boutique and an Hour Passion in the Designer Outlet in Roermond. For the head office in the Netherlands (Eindhoven) we are immediately looking for a: Business/ finance Controller (full-time and on location). Functie As Controller you will be the sparring partner for the Commercial organization and contribute to the further development and professionalization of the Finance team. As Controller you are fully PnL responsible for our B2B business activities and you have an overarching and coordinating role in key processes such as monthly closing, budget and sales forecast. In this role you function as the right hand of the CFO. Key activities and responsibilities: Contribute to our growth strategy by delivering compelling analysis and presentations Provide insight into gross and net margin development Support and advise in the preparation of business cases for the opening of new outlets Reporting forecasts both commercially and financially Active contribution in the monthly closing in cooperation with the other Finance colleagues Preparation of cash flow analyses and projections and capex controlling Presenting the operational and commercial results to the management (CEO & CFO). There are also opportunities, for example, to automate and optimize reporting. We also see opportunities to further improve processes. Profiel Furthermore, do you recognize yourself in; HBO+ or WO educated with at least 3 -5 years of relevant work experience Making clear financial analyses for management to operations A team mentality, but able to work independently Skill in working with various IT systems, such as SAP, SAP BW and Office 365 Good skills in the English language where Dutch is an advantage. You function well in an organization; Which is dynamic. Working ad hoc, prioritizing, switching quickly gives you energy In development. Growth ambition and we work on long-term relationships Where we value work atmosphere and working in the office is the norm Who is Corporate but see a lot of potential in process improvements. Aanbod What will you get from us? The opportunity to work in a growing, international organization in the center of Eindhoven An independent, but certainly also challenging, and versatile position for 40 hours per week A competitive and interesting benefits package, including 26 vacation days based on full-time employment Excellent pension accrual The opportunity to take out collective health insurance through The Swatch Group; Veld 7 Are you excited? Please respond via the application button and we will contact you as soon as possible. Any questions? Please contact Erik van Mullem from the HR department. Mobile: + 31 6 51 23 62 00 Email: erik.vanmullem@nl.swatchgroup.com Job location Kennedyplein 8 5611 ZS ZS Eindhoven (Noord-Brabant) Netherlands Company address The Swatch Group (Netherlands) B.V. P.O. Box 511 / NL-5600 AM Eindhoven NL-5611 ZS Eindhoven Apply for this job Share this job offer

descriptionByLocale.en:
## Bedrijfsintroductie
Swatch Group is the world's number one manufacturer of watches. With 16 watch brands, the Group is represented in all price ranges, additionally active in the production and sale of jewelry, watch developments and components. Swatch Group represents the following watch brands, among others: Breguet, Harry Winston, Blancpain, Glashütte Original, Jaquet Droz, Omega, Longines, Rado, Union Glashütte, Tissot, Balmain, Certina, Mido, Hamilton, Swatch and Flik Flak. The Group has a strong distribution and multi-brand retail network with two sophisticated boutiques under the name Tourbillon and Hour Passion. Swatch Group is a major player in advanced nanomechanical, nanoelectronic and Bluetooth technologies essential for watchmaking and other industries. From our headquarters in Eindhoven, the Netherlands, we supply independent jewelers and chain stores. In addition, The Swatch Group Netherlands has a growing number of its own outlets, such as Swatch Stores, Tissot Boutique and an Hour Passion in the Designer Outlet in Roermond.

## Functie
As Controller you will be the sparring partner for the Commercial organization and contribute to the further development and professionalization of the Finance team. As Controller you are fully PnL responsible for our B2B business activities and you have an overarching and coordinating role in key processes such as monthly closing, budget and sales forecast. In this role you function as the right hand of the CFO.

## Mansioni
- Contribute to our growth strategy by delivering compelling analysis and presentations
- Provide insight into gross and net margin development
- Support and advise in the preparation of business cases for the opening of new outlets
- Reporting forecasts both commercially and financially
- Active contribution in the monthly closing in cooperation with the other Finance colleagues
- Preparation of cash flow analyses and projections and capex controlling
- Presenting the operational and commercial results to the management (CEO & CFO)

## Profiel
- HBO+ or WO educated with at least 3 -5 years of relevant work experience
- Making clear financial analyses for management to operations
- A team mentality, but able to work independently
- Skill in working with various IT systems, such as SAP, SAP BW and Office 365
- Good skills in the English language where Dutch is an advantage

## Aanbod
- The opportunity to work in a growing, international organization in the center of Eindhoven
- An independent, but certainly also challenging, and versatile position for 40 hours per week
- A competitive and interesting benefits package, including 26 vacation days based on full-time employment
- Excellent pension accrual
- The opportunity to take out collective health insurance through The Swatch Group

## Contatto
- Are you excited? Please respond via the application button and we will contact you as soon as possible.
- Any questions? Please contact Erik van Mullem from the HR department.
- Mobile: + 31 6 51 23 62 00
- Email: erik.vanmullem@nl.swatchgroup.com
- Job location: Kennedyplein 8 5611 ZS ZS Eindhoven (Noord-Brabant) Netherlands
- Company address: The Swatch Group (Netherlands) B.V. P.O. Box 511 / NL-5600 AM Eindhoven NL-5611 ZS Eindhoven
descriptionByLocale.it: Bedrijfsintroductie Swatch Group è il primo produttore mondiale di orologi. Con 16 marchi di orologi, il Gruppo è rappresentato in tutte le fasce di prezzo, inoltre attivo nella produzione e vendita di gioielli, orologi e componenti. Swatch Group rappresenta i seguenti marchi di orologi, tra gli altri: Breguet, Harry Winston, Blancpain, Glashütte Original, Jaquet Droz, Omega, Longines, Rado, Union Glashütte, Tissot, Balmain, Certina, Mido, Hamilton, Swatch e Flik Flak. Il Gruppo ha una forte rete di distribuzione e vendita al dettaglio multi-brand con due raffinate boutique sotto il nome Tourbillon e Hour Passion. Swatch Group è un giocatore importante nelle tecnologie nanomeccaniche, nanoelettroniche e Bluetooth avanzate essenziali per l'orologeria e altre industrie. Dalla nostra sede a Eindhoven, nei Paesi Bassi, forniamo gioiellieri indipendenti e negozi di catene. Inoltre, il Gruppo Swatch Paesi Bassi ha un numero crescente di propri outlet, come Swatch Stores, Tissot Boutique e una Passione d'Oro nel Designer Outlet di Roermond. ## Functie As Controller sarai il partner sparring per l'organizzazione Commerciale e contribuirai all'ulteriore sviluppo e professionalità del team Finance. Come Controller sei completamente responsabile per le nostre attività aziendali B2B e hai un ruolo di supervisione e coordinamento in processi chiave come la chiusura mensile, il budget e le previsioni di vendita. In questo ruolo funzioni come la mano destra del CFO. ## Mansioni - Contribuire alla nostra strategia di crescita fornendo analisi e presentazioni convincenti - Fornire informazioni sullo sviluppo dei margini lordi e netti - Supporto e consulenza nella preparazione di casi di business per l'apertura di nuovi punti vendita - Reporting forecasting sia commercialmente che finanziariamente - Contributo attivo nella chiusura mensile in collaborazione con gli altri colleghi di finanza - Preparazione di analisi del flusso di cassa e proiezioni e controllo capex - Presentare i risultati operativi e commerciali al management L'opportunità di lavorare in una crescente, organizzazione internazionale nel centro di Eindhoven - Un indipendente, ma certamente anche impegnativo, e posizione versatile per 40 ore a settimana - Un pacchetto di prestazioni competitivo e interessante, tra cui 26 giorni di vacanza in base al lavoro a tempo pieno - Eccellente pensione matura - L'opportunità di stipulare un'assicurazione sanitaria collettiva attraverso il Gruppo Swatch ## Contatto - Sei emozionato? Si prega di rispondere tramite il pulsante dell'applicazione e vi contatteremo il prima possibile. - Domande? Contatta Erik van Mullem del dipartimento HR. - Mobile: + 31 6 51 23 62 00 - Email: erik.vanmullem@nl.swatchgroup.com - Luogo di lavoro: Kennedyplein 8 5611 ZS Eindhoven (Noord-Brabant) Paesi Bassi - Indirizzo dell'azienda: The Swatch Group (Netherlands) B.V. P.O. Box 511 / NL-5600 AM Eindhoven NL-5611 ZS Eindhoven
descriptionByLocale.de: Bedrijfsintroductie Swatch Group ist der weltweit führende Hersteller von Uhren. Mit 16 Uhrenmarken ist die Gruppe in allen Preisklassen vertreten, zusätzlich aktiv in der Herstellung und Verkauf von Schmuck, Uhrenentwicklungen und Komponenten. Swatch Group vertritt u.a. folgende Uhrenmarken: Breguet, Harry Winston, Blancpain, Glashütte Original, Jaquet Droz, Omega, Longines, Rado, Union Glashütte, Tissot, Balmain, Certina, Mido, Hamilton, Swatch und Flik Flak. Die Gruppe verfügt über ein starkes Vertriebs- und Multi-Marken-Händlernetzwerk mit zwei anspruchsvollen Boutiquen unter dem Namen Tourbillon und Hour Passion. Swatch Group ist ein wichtiger Player in fortschrittlichen nanomechanischen, nanoelektronischen und Bluetooth-Technologien, die für die Uhrmacherei und andere Branchen unerlässlich sind. Von unserem Hauptsitz in Eindhoven, den Niederlanden, liefern wir unabhängige Juweliere und Kettenläden. Darüber hinaus hat die Swatch Group Netherlands eine wachsende Anzahl von eigenen Outlets wie Swatch Stores, Tissot Boutique und einen Hour Passion im Designer Outlet in Roermond. Functie Als Controller werden Sie der Sparring-Partner der Handelsorganisation sein und zur Weiterentwicklung und Professionalisierung des Finanzteams beitragen. Als Controller sind Sie voll PnL verantwortlich für unsere B2B Geschäftsaktivitäten und Sie haben eine übergeordnete und koordinierende Rolle in Schlüsselprozessen wie monatliche Schließung, Budget und Verkaufsprognose. In dieser Rolle fungieren Sie als die rechte Hand des CFOs. SAP Mansioni - Beitrag zu unserer Wachstumsstrategie, indem er überzeugende Analysen und Präsentationen liefert - Einblicke in die Entwicklung der Brutto- und Nettomarge - Unterstützung und Beratung bei der Vorbereitung von Geschäftsfällen für die Eröffnung neuer Steckdosen - Reporting Prognosen sowohl kommerziell als auch finanziell - Aktiver Beitrag in der monatlichen Schließung in Zusammenarbeit mit den anderen Finanzkollegen - Vorbereitung von Cashflow-Analysen und Projektionen und Capex Controlling - Präsentation der operativen und kommerziellen Ergebnisse in der Geschäftsführung Die Möglichkeit, in einer wachsenden, internationalen Organisation im Zentrum von Eindhoven zu arbeiten - Eine unabhängige, aber sicherlich auch anspruchsvolle und vielseitige Position für 40 Stunden pro Woche - Ein wettbewerbsfähiges und interessantes Leistungspaket, einschließlich 26 Urlaubstage auf Vollzeitbeschäftigung - Ausgezeichnete Pension accrual - Die Möglichkeit, Kollektivkrankenversicherung durch die Swatch Group zu übernehmen - Sind Sie begeistert? Bitte antworten Sie über die Schaltfläche Anwendung und wir werden Sie so schnell wie möglich kontaktieren. - Noch Fragen? Bitte kontaktieren Sie Erik van Mullem von der Personalabteilung. - Mobil: + 31 6 51 23 62 00 - Email: erik.vanmullem@nl.swatchgroup.com - Standort: Kennedyplein 8 5611 ZS ZS Eindhoven (Noord-Brabant) Niederlande - Firmenadresse: The Swatch Group (Niederlande) B.V. P.O. Box 511 / NL-5600 AM Eindhoven NL-5611 ZS Eindhoven
descriptionByLocale.fr: Bedrijfsintroductie Swatch Group est le premier fabricant mondial de montres. Avec 16 marques horlogères, le Groupe est représenté dans toutes les gammes de prix, en plus d'être actif dans la production et la vente de bijoux, de développements horlogers et de composants. Swatch Group représente notamment les marques horlogères suivantes : Breguet, Harry Winston, Blancpain, Glashütte Original, Jaquet Droz, Omega, Longines, Rado, Union Glashütte, Tissot, Balmain, Certina, Mido, Hamilton, Swatch et Flik Flak. Le Groupe dispose d'un réseau de distribution et de distribution multimarques avec deux boutiques sophistiquées sous le nom de Tourbillon et Hour Passion. Swatch Group est un acteur majeur des technologies nanomécaniques, nanoélectroniques et Bluetooth de pointe essentielles pour l'horlogerie et d'autres industries. De notre siège à Eindhoven, aux Pays-Bas, nous fournissons des bijoutiers indépendants et des chaînes de magasins. En outre, The Swatch Group Netherlands a un nombre croissant de ses propres points de vente, tels que Swatch Stores, Tissot Boutique et une passion d'heure dans le Designer Outlet de Roermond. ## Functie En tant que contrôleur, vous serez le partenaire de l'organisation commerciale et contribuerez au perfectionnement et à la professionnalisation de l'équipe Finance. En tant que contrôleur, vous êtes entièrement responsable de nos activités B2B et vous avez un rôle primordial et de coordination dans les processus clés tels que la clôture mensuelle, le budget et les prévisions de ventes. Dans ce rôle, vous agissez comme la main droite du CFO. ## Mansioni - Contribuer à notre stratégie de croissance en fournissant des analyses et des présentations convaincantes - Donner un aperçu de l'évolution de la marge brute et nette - Soutenir et conseiller dans la préparation des analyses de rentabilisation pour l'ouverture de nouveaux points de vente - Faire rapport des prévisions à la fois commerciale et financière - Contribution active à la clôture mensuelle en collaboration avec les autres collègues des Finances - Préparation d'analyses de flux de trésorerie et de projections et contrôle du capex - Présenter les résultats opérationnels et commerciaux à la direction (OEC et DPF) ## Profil - HBO+ ou WO ayant reçu au moins 3 à 5 ans d'expérience de travail pertinente - Faire des analyses financières claires pour la gestion aux opérations - Une mentalité d'équipe, mais capable de travailler de façon indépendante - Compétence dans le travail avec divers systèmes de TI, tels que SAP, SAP BW et Office 365 - Bonnes compétences en langue anglaise où le néerlandais est un avantage ## Aanbod - L'occasion de travailler dans une organisation internationale croissante dans le centre d'Eindhoven - Un poste indépendant, mais certainement aussi difficile, et polyvalent pendant 40 heures par semaine - Un forfait d'avantages concurrentiels et intéressants, y compris 26 jours de vacances basés sur l'emploi à temps plein - Excellente accumulation de pensions - L'occasion de souscrire une assurance maladie collective par l'intermédiaire du Groupe Swatch ## Contatto - Êtes-vous excité? Veuillez répondre par le bouton d'application et nous vous contacterons dès que possible. - Des questions ? Veuillez contacter Erik van Mullem du département RH. - Mobile: + 31 6 51 23 62 00 - Email: erik.vanmullem@nl.swatchgroup.com - Lieu de travail: Kennedyplein 8 5611 ZS ZS Eindhoven (Noord-Brabant) Pays-Bas - Adresse de la société: The Swatch Group (Pays-Bas) B.V. P.O. Box 511 / NL-5600 AM Eindhoven NL-5611 ZS Eindhoven
